sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 140 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.160/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.12.2025 Applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. Matter is pending since 2018 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Since inception applicant remains unrepresented or adjournments were sought on behalf of applicant. In view hereof, it appears that the applicant department is not interested in present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
